HSC Survey Results

German Bank Survey # 1 Results from 04/08/2025

Survey Details

5 commercial purse seiners conducted this fishing survey on 04/08/2025 starting at 21:00:00.

All vessels ran two transects in the German Bank box and two transect in the Seal Island Box.

There was a plankton tow and replicate conducted and CTD cast by Lady Melissa.

No tags were applied during this survey.

Samples were obtained for target strength estimation.

Acoustic Equipment

Each vessel was equipped with a Simrad ES38-18/200-18C combi (2-in-1) transducer prior to the survey that contains a 38kHz split beam and 200 kHz single beam transducer. Data was logged to the computer hard-drive for post-processing. All participating boats were calibrated on 38kHz before the survey.

Survey Results

Main Results

The results are subject to change as DFO will re-evaluate data editing, area estimation and apply a target strength.

Preliminary biomass prediction for German Bank using standardized parallel transects is 6,194mt. The preliminary biomass estimate for Seal Island is 1,160mt.

Vessel Performance

Speed

Average vessel speed was 8.63. This is above the 8 knot requirement; vessels are urged to slow down to prevent backscatter noise from interfering with the acoustic data.

The speed for each transect are rudimentary and are calculated based on distance. If a significant amount of distance is cut, the speed will appear slower.

Distance

No significant distance was cut from the planned lines; vessels covered the planned area well.
